title: Iron Generators
description: Adds various generators from Stone - Unobtainable to produce power!
body:
Latest Update

- Added Mekanism Generators (Bronze, Copper, Lead, Osmium, Refined Obsidian,Steel & Tin)

- Added Applied Energistics 2 Generators (Certus & Skystone)

 

The "More Generators" - Mod adds brand new Generators to the game! They consume any kind of fuel with a burn tick time.

The lowest generator is the Stone generator with an efficiency of 50%. Here is a table of these Generators:

- Stone Generator: 50% efficiency; running at 15Fe/t

- Iron Generator: 80% efficiency; running at 24Fe/t

- Gold Generator: 100% efficiency; running at 30Fe/t

- Diamond Generator: 140% efficiency; running at 42Fe/t

- Obsidian Generator: 150% efficiency; running at 45Fe/t

- Netherite Generator: 200% efficiency; running at 60Fe/t

So it's very simple to craft these with some diamonds and obsidian, but this mod should be easy for newcommers or an fast possibility for low energy production.

 

Inspired by More Furnaces!
